name: Kawaki
description:
__Height:__ 183 cm 
__Affiliation:__ ~!Kara, Konohagakure!~ 

Kawaki is a shinobi raised by [Jigen](https://anilist.co/character/130418/Jigen) and his organization Kara to be the future vessel for [Isshiki Ōtsutsuki.](https://anilist.co/character/189948/Isshiki-Ootsutsuki) After being brought to Konohagakure, he is taken in by [Naruto Uzumaki](https://anilist.co/character/17/Naruto-Uzumaki) and develops a brotherly bond with [Boruto Uzumaki.](https://anilist.co/character/121439/Boruto-Uzumaki) 

After being brought to Konohagakure by Team 7, he is taken in by Naruto Uzumaki who raises him as his own, during which he develops a brotherly bond with Boruto Uzumaki to solve the mystery of the Kāma. Stemming from his harsh childhood, Kawaki is shown to be aggressive and vulgar to people he dislikes or opposes. He showed sympathy for weak and injured animals and refused to let innocent children get hurt. He is Naruto's disciple just like Boruto is Sasuke's.

~!He also learned the shadow clone technique from Naruto.!~
